description: Current earned autonomy tier for the (future) LLM drift classifier, read by scripts/classifier-walls.py. Default advisory_comment. Promoted ONLY by humans per the promotion protocol in autonomy-policy.json (eval-set recall floor cleared + reviewed PR). Hash-pinned via .harness-hash-extra-patterns: editing this file requires a fresh `scripts/audit-harness init` in the same reviewed commit, so a silent self-promotion fails CI.
